creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Hans Petter Selasky <hps@selasky.org> -----

Hi,

Can you try to install webcamd from:

svn --username anonsvn --password anonsvn \
      checkout svn://svn.turbocat.net/i4b/trunk/ports

And see if this issue is already fixed. You might also need to install
a fresh cuse4bsd kernel module. Else you maybe need to send an e-mail
to:

linux-media@vger.kernel.org

about this problem.

--HPS

----- End forwarded message -----
